title: Entity Render Distance Extender
description: Extends from how far away entities render.
body:
**About**

What this mod does is pretty simple; All it does is it gives a config option to extend from how far away entities render and from how far away they are tracked - both of which are hardcorded in vanilla minecraft. Please do note: Hostile mobs will still be despawned as usual, this has nothing to do with if they're rendered.

 
**F.A.Q**

 

Q: When port to version x.x.x?

A: If you want to do it, go ahead.

 

Q: Modpacks?

A: Of course! No need to ask.
